events.title: Israel launches extensive strikes across Lebanon
events.desc: Hours after US-Iran ceasefire announcement, Israel struck Beirut southern suburbs, South Lebanon, and eastern Bekaa Valley. At least 182 killed, 890 wounded. Ceasefire does not appear to include Israeli operations.

events.title: US-Iran ceasefire announced — described as 'fragile'
events.desc: A conditional pause in hostilities brokered with Pakistani involvement. US claims war objectives met — stopping Iran nuclear acquisition and degrading arsenal. Negotiators face significant gaps between 15-point US plan and Iran's 10-point counter.

events.title: WHO suspends medical evacuations in Gaza
events.desc: An Israeli strike killed a contractor driving a vehicle believed by IDF to pose an immediate threat. WHO halted all medical evacuation operations.

events.title: Regional spillover — Lebanese ceasefire scope disputed
events.desc: Iran's deputy FM describes Israeli strikes in Lebanon as a 'grave violation' of the ceasefire. Lebanon believed it was included in the US-Iran deal. Israel's continued operations indicate otherwise.

events.title: Strait of Hormuz — reduced vessel traffic
events.desc: Ships proceeding with caution. Only a few vessels have crossed the Strait since ceasefire announcement. Oil prices fell 15% but remain above pre-war levels.

events.title: Shooting at Israeli consulate in Istanbul
events.desc: One gunman killed, two injured. Israeli diplomatic personnel had not been present at the consulate for two-and-a-half years.

events.title: APT34 / OilRig — phishing campaign targeting Gulf financial sector
events.desc: IRGC-linked threat group conducting credential harvesting ops against financial services entities in the Gulf region. Spearphishing lures themed around ceasefire announcements. Targets include asset management and banking institutions.

events.title: Mint Sandstorm — infrastructure reconnaissance activity
events.desc: IRGC-affiliated group observed conducting reconnaissance against energy sector targets. Consistent with pre-positioning behavior ahead of potential escalation. No confirmed exploitation.

events.title: Iran nuclear program — IAEA access update
events.desc: Following ceasefire, IAEA inspectors remain restricted from Fordow. Enrichment status at 60% purity unconfirmed since last reporting period. US stated objective of degrading arsenal — verification ongoing.

events.title: Houthi maritime operations — Red Sea posture
events.desc: Despite ceasefire, Houthi forces maintain capability posture in Red Sea. Commercial shipping rerouting continues. No new confirmed attacks since ceasefire announcement.

events.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson released in Iraq
events.desc: Released following US-Iran ceasefire announcement. Seen as a confidence-building measure by Iran-aligned militias.

events.title: Charming Kitten — social engineering targeting think tanks
events.desc: Threat group targeting Middle East policy researchers and analysts with elaborate persona-based social engineering. Likely intelligence collection on ceasefire negotiation positions.
